subject: Gaming
title: Cloud Gaming: Play Anywhere
description: A 60-second lesson on Cloud Gaming: Play Anywhere.

hook.text: Play any game on any device without downloading it. Cloud gaming wants to be the Netflix of games.

buildup.text: Google Stadia launched in 2019 promising gaming without consoles. Just an internet connection.

discovery.text: Xbox Cloud Gaming and GeForce Now proved the technology worked—if your internet was fast enough.

twist.text: Google Stadia shut down in 2023. The biggest cloud gaming launch became its biggest failure.

climax.text: Microsoft's Game Pass with cloud streaming showed the model works inside a larger ecosystem.

punchline.text: Google failed. Microsoft adapted. Cloud gaming is a feature, not a platform.

quiz.question: What happened to Google Stadia?
options: It shut down in 2023 after failing to attract enough users
